Event: Roving Restaurant
Event Date: 08/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM340
Jaw of Law Amulet

Once every 7 sec., the unit removes all negative effects from self, and increases own maximum health, damage, crit and physical armor piercing by 20% for 4 sec. The unit also restores 300000 health to self every second for 4 sec. All allied units in a small radius around the amulet's wearer restore health equal to 50% of the health restored by the amulet's wearer.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
